title: Amtech S2550 2 Piece bradawl and Gimlet Set
features: COMFORTABLE TO USE: With comfortable moulded plastic handles, this bradawl and gimlet set is ideal for drilling and marking
VERSATILE: The bradawl has a sharp point and is ideal for starting neat holes while the gimlet can be used to start a thread
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and tool products come with a 36 month assurance and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning Yes
